texto: Don’t wait for passion to arrive before taking action
autor: action creates emotion and emotion is the language of passion.
explicacao: Citação de action creates emotion and emotion is the language of passion. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Don’t wait for passion to arrive before taking action” articula reflexao, mensah-oteh, passion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
